title: Medical imaging arrangement for a mobile device
abstract: A medical image arrangement for a mobile device is disclosed. The medical image arrangement is an arrangement that can be attached to a mobile device. The medical image arrangement for a mobile device comprises openings for at least one camera lens and for at least one lighting device. The opening for a lighting device further comprises a shade that directs light beams from the lighting device to a desired destination. The arrangement further comprises a computer program for acquiring images with a mobile device equipped with a medical image arrangement for a mobile device.
claims:
Claims 1. A medical imaging tool comprising a body adapted to be attached on a mobile device, which body comprises : a mount configured to receive a mouth mirror; and a shade configured to limit the light beam of a lighting device of the mobile device to which the medical imaging tool is attached. 2. A medical imaging tool according to claim 1, wherein the mount is a clip. 3. A medical imaging tool according to claim 1, wherein the mount is an opening. 4. A medical imaging tool according to claim 3, wherein the opening further comprises fixing means for fixing the mouth mirror into the examination position . 5. A medical imaging tool according to any of preceding claims 1 - 4, wherein the shade is configured to prevent the lighting device from lighting the teeth. 6. A medical imaging tool according to any of preceding claims 1 - 5, wherein a protective cover is arranged on the surface of the medical imaging tool and the mobile device. 7. A medical imaging tool according to claim 6, wherein the case is manufactured of a clear plastic. 8. A mobile device comprising a camera and a medical imaging tool according to any of preceding claims 1 - 7. 9. A computer program comprising computer program code which, when the computer program code is executed by a computing device according to claim 8, is configured to: activate a lighting device of the mobile device; and acquire at least one image using the camera of the mobile device. 10. A computer program according to claim 9, wherein the computer program is further configured to 

provide a control for manually adjusting the focus of the camera. 11. A computer program according to claim 9 or 10, wherein the computer program is further configured to provide a control for manually adjusting the exposure of the camera. 12. A computer program according to any of preceding claims 9 - 11, wherein the computer program is further configured to provide a control for zooming to a selected point of interest. 13. A computer program according to any of preceding claims 9 - 11, wherein the computer program is further configured to detect a point of examination and to adjust the exposure automatically based on the detected point of examination. 14. A method of imaging a patient, wherein the method comprises acquiring an image using a mobile device of claim 8.
